settings.title: Hidden Repaints
settings.desc: Factory paint vs repainted panels glow differently under UV. We instantly spot any panel that has been resprayed.

settings.title: Accident Damage
settings.desc: Collision repairs, putty fillers, and body filler leave clear UV signatures. Sellers can't hide past accidents.

settings.title: Rust & Corrosion
settings.desc: Rust under the paint and corrosion treated with chemicals all show up clearly.

settings.title: Panel Replacements
settings.desc: Replaced panels, welded sections, and structural repairs are detected.

settings.title: Filler & Putty
settings.desc: Body filler glows bright orange under UV. Even thin layers are instantly revealed.

settings.title: Seal & Trim Repairs
settings.desc: Window seal replacements and adhesive residue indicate past water damage.

settings.title: UV Light Reveals What Human Eyes Can't
settings.subtitle: Under UV light, original factory paint glows differently than repainted panels — making every repair, accident, and cover-up instantly visible.

settings.title: Negotiate with Evidence
settings.desc: Get documented proof to negotiate thousands off the asking price.

settings.title: Avoid Accident Cars
settings.desc: Accident history affects resale value and safety. Know before you commit.

settings.title: Pre-PPF Inspection
settings.desc: Before applying PPF or ceramic coating, know the true condition of your paint.

settings.title: Written Report Available
settings.desc: Get a detailed panel-by-panel report documenting all findings for your records.

settings.title: Don't Overpay for a Repainted Car
settings.subtitle: In Pakistan's used car market, repainted and accident cars are sold at original prices every day.

settings.title: Book Your Slot
settings.desc: Choose your vehicle type and preferred date online. We confirm via WhatsApp within 1 hour.

settings.title: Drop Off Your Car
settings.desc: Bring your car to our studio in Karachi. No special preparation needed.

settings.title: Panel-by-Panel UV Scan
settings.desc: Our specialist scans every panel — bonnet, fenders, doors, pillars, roof, boot — under professional UV lamps.

settings.title: Verbal Findings Report
settings.desc: We walk you through every finding on the spot. Written report available on request.

settings.title: Take Action
settings.desc: Armed with full knowledge, negotiate confidently or proceed with PPF/ceramic.

settings.title: Buying a Used Car
settings.desc: Before finalizing any used car purchase, get a UV inspection. Know exactly what you're paying for.

settings.title: Before PPF or Ceramic
settings.desc: Applying PPF or ceramic on a repainted surface wastes your investment. Inspect first.
